title: Natural-language backtest demo
prompt: Backtest a simple moving-average crossover strategy for BTC-USDT from 2024-01-01 to 2024-06-30 using daily candles, then summarize return, drawdown, and trade count.
expected_highlights: The agent converts a natural-language request into a backtest task.
The result explains assumptions, metrics, and limitations.
No secrets, account identifiers, or real user data are required.
notes: Use public market data only. This scenario is a tiny scaffold example, not a performance claim.
